item.title: 👑 CVPR 2026 | Guiding a Diffusion Transformer with the Internal Dynamics of Itself
👑 CVPR 2026 | IDESplat: Iterative Depth Probability Estimation for Generalizable 3D Gaussian Splatting
🎉 ICLR 2026 | MVAR: Visual Autoregressive Modeling with Scale and Spatial Markovian Conditioning
🎉 ICLR 2026 | Texture Vector-Quantization and Reconstruction Aware Prediction for Generative Super-Resolution
🏆 ICCV 2025 | Consistency Trajectory Matching for One-Step Generative Super-Resolution
🏆 ICCV 2025 | Learning Pixel-adaptive Multi-layer Perceptrons for Real-time Image Enhancement
🏆 ICCV 2025 | PerLDiff：Controllable Street View Synthesis Using Perspective-Layout Diffusion Models
🏆 ICCVW 2025 | HiLLIE: Human-in-the-Loop Training for Low-Light Image Enhancement
👑 CVPR 2026 | Task-Aware Image Signal Processor for Advanced Visual Perception
Generative Image Compression by Estimating Gradients of the Rate-variable Feature Distribution
LRTI-VSR: Learning Long-Range Refocused Temporal Information from Short Video Clips
Neural Stereo Video Compression with Hybrid Disparity Compensation
👑 CVPR 2025 | Learned Image Compression with Dictionary-based Entropy Model
